title: Update success path in oscore_protect_request after oscore_option_build for persist_ssn NVM handling
description: At lines ~1520-1523: after *oscore_opt_len = (size_t)opt_len;, do ret = oscore_ctx_persist_ssn(ctx); if (ret == OSCORE_ERR_NVM_FAILED) goto nvm_failed; else ret = OSCORE_OK; Ensure this is ONLY on the full success path (after all crypto and option build succeed). Update per project-LICHEN-ow3c.1.3.4.2.2.2.
close_reason: Updated success path with explicit else for persist_ssn NVM handling after option build in oscore_protect_request. Test verified via test_nvm_protect_request_failure. Matches bead spec exactly. No subbeads created.
